title: [InstCombine] Propagate profile metadata when combining selects
author: boomanaiden154
description:
When we simplify a pair of selects, we want to propagate profile information when the condition remains the same and drop it when it does not. Before this patch, we were keeping incorrect profile data in addition to not annotating any new select instructions that had the same value as a previous one.

Noticed by looking at 80d9df6b054cebfbe97d709195be4e61a7acc694.

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i8> @strong_order_cmp_eq_ugt_vector_poison3(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
  %cmp.eq = icmp eq <2 x i32> %a, %b
  %sel.eq = select <2 x i1> %cmp.eq, <2 x i8> zeroinitializer, <2 x i8> splat (i8 -1)
  %cmp.gt = icmp ugt <2 x i32> %a, %b
  %sel.gt = select <2 x i1> %cmp.gt, <2 x i8> <i8 1, i8 poison>, <2 x i8> %sel.eq
  ret <2 x i8> %sel.gt
}

define float @foo1(float %a) {
  %b = fcmp ogt float %a, 0.000000e+00
  %c = select i1 %b, float %a, float 0.000000e+00
  %d = fcmp olt float %c, 1.000000e+00
  %f = select i1 %d, float %c, float 1.000000e+00
  ret float %f
}
